subcodes.first_line: O God, Bestower of gifts! Thou dost single out with Thy mercy whomsoever Thou willest among created things, and guidest whom Thou choosest through Thy bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا واهب العطایا تختص برحمتک من تشاء من البرایا تهدی من تشاء بفیضک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
